catalysts.catalyst_details: Best Buy's 4Q26 top line missed analyst expectations. Sales decreased -1.0% y/y to $13.8bn and enterprise comparable sales decreased -0.8% y/y, below the GS estimate of +1.2% and consensus of +0.1%.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: BBY reported 4Q26 adj. EPS of $2.61, above the GS estimate of $2.50 and consensus (Factset) of $2.46. Sales decreased -1.0% y/y to $13.8bn and enterprise comparable sales decreased -0.8% y/y, below the GS estimate of +1.2% and consensus of +0.1%.

catalysts.catalyst_details: Best Buy's 4Q26 adjusted EPS of $2.61 beat GS estimate of $2.50 and consensus of $2.46. Adj. EBIT margin increased 8 bps y/y to 5.0%, above GS/Cons. estimates of 4.9%/4.9%.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: BBY reported 4Q26 adj. EPS of $2.61, above the GS estimate of $2.50 and consensus (Factset) of $2.46. Adj. EBIT margin increased 8 bps y/y to 5.0%, above GS/Cons. estimates of 4.9%/4.9%.

catalysts.catalyst_details: Best Buy introduced FY27 guidance, including revenue of $41.2bn-$42.1bn (vs. consensus of $42.2bn), comparable sales of -1.0% to +1.0% (vs. consensus of +1.4%), and adj. EPS of $6.30-$6.60 (vs. consensus of $6.63), all below consensus expectations.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: BBY introduced FY27 guidance, including revenue of $41.2bn-$42.1bn (vs. consensus of $42.2bn), comparable sales of -1.0% to +1.0% (vs. consensus of +1.4%), adj. EBIT margin of 4.3% to 4.4% (vs. consensus 4.3%), and adj. EPS of $6.30-$6.60 (vs. consensus of $6.63).

catalysts.catalyst_details: Inventory increased +2.9% y/y while sales decreased -1.0% y/y, suggesting potential inventory build-up relative to demand.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: Inventory increased +2.9% y/y (vs. sales of -1.0%), and the payables ratio n decreased to 90.7% from 97.9% in the prior year and compares to 91.6% during 3Q26.

catalysts.catalyst_details: Investors will be looking for commentary regarding quarter-to-date sales and operational trends during the upcoming conference call.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: On the conference call, we will be looking for commentary regarding quarter-to-date trends;

catalysts.catalyst_details: Investors will be looking for commentary on expectations for consumer demand in FY27 during the upcoming conference call.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: expectations for consumer demand in FY27;

catalysts.catalyst_details: Investors will be looking for commentary on promotional levels during the upcoming conference call, which could impact margins.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: promotional levels;

catalysts.catalyst_details: Investors will be looking for commentary on trade down trends (consumers opting for lower-priced products) during the upcoming conference call.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: trade down trends;

catalysts.catalyst_details: Investors will be looking for commentary on wallet shifts between product categories during the upcoming conference call.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: wallet shifts between categories;

catalysts.catalyst_details: Investors will be looking for commentary on inventory availability during the upcoming conference call.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: inventory availability;

catalysts.catalyst_details: Investors will be looking for commentary on the state of the supply chain during the upcoming conference call.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: the state of the supply chain;

catalysts.catalyst_details: Investors will be looking for commentary on inflation headwinds during the upcoming conference call, which could impact costs and margins.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: inflation headwinds;

catalysts.catalyst_details: Investors will be looking for commentary on future margin expectations during the upcoming conference call.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: and margin expectations.

catalysts.catalyst_details: Demand for consumer electronics remaining pressured for longer than expected could negatively impact Best Buy's top line and margins.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: Downside risks include if demand for consumer electronics remains pressured for longer than expected, weighing on BBY’s top line and margin;

catalysts.catalyst_details: A longer-than-normal deferral of the upgrade/replacement cycle for consumer electronics could limit Best Buy's potential sales growth.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: if the upgrade/replacement cycle is deferred for longer than normal, limiting BBY’s potential sales growth;

catalysts.catalyst_details: If innovation in consumer electronics fails to drive demand or is less than expected, it could negatively impact Best Buy.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: if innovation fails to drive demand, or if the level of innovation is less than expected;

catalysts.catalyst_details: A continued negative impact from the broader macroeconomic environment on demand for higher-ticket items could hurt Best Buy.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: if the broader macro environment continues to weigh on demand for higher-ticket items;

catalysts.catalyst_details: Best Buy losing market share to other retailers, especially online-only competitors, poses a downside risk.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: if BBY loses share to other retailers, particularly online-only retailers;

catalysts.catalyst_details: An increase in industry-wide promotional levels could negatively impact Best Buy's gross margin.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: if industry-wide promotional levels increase, weighing on gross margin;

catalysts.catalyst_details: Higher-than-expected wage and other operating costs could lead to further operating margin compression for Best Buy.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: if wage and other costs are higher than expected, driving further operating margin compression;

catalysts.catalyst_topic: Consumer Behavior, Sales Mix, Market Competition
catalysts.catalyst_details: Consumers trading down to lower-priced products or seeking value at other retailers could negatively impact Best Buy's sales and profitability.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: if consumers trade down into lower-priced products and or seek value at other retailers;

catalysts.catalyst_details: An increase in shrink (inventory loss due to theft, damage, etc.) could create a more intense margin headwind for Best Buy.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: and if shrink increases, creating a more intense margin headwind.
